_note: Inventory of art works. `works` = the 4 homepage tiles. `art_works` = full Art Works page grid (Figma mobile 489:4 = content source, desktop 491:928 = layout). Each art_work: artist link, optional bilingual title, gallery link (→ homepage #galleries), sold flag, optional gray details, image + responsive variant widths. Page embeds this inline (file:// can't fetch); keep both in sync.
